title: Upon Luggs. Epig.
content:
Luggs, by the condemnation of the Bench,
    Was lately whipt for lying with a wench.
    Thus pains and pleasures turn by turn succeed:
    He smarts at last who does not first take heed.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Herrick delivers a powerful performance in "Upon Luggs. Epig."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
